section.heading: Required disclosures to State boxing commissions by sanctioning organizations
section.chapeau: A sanctioning organization shall not be entitled to receive any compensation directly or indirectly in connection with a boxing match until it provides to the boxing commission responsible for regulating the match in a State a statement of—

paragraph.content: all charges, fees, and costs the organization will assess any boxer participating in that match;
all payments, benefits, complimentary benefits, and fees the organization will receive for its affiliation with the event, from the promoter, host of the event, and all other sources; and
such additional information as the commission may require.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 12 of Pub. L. 104–272 was renumbered section 20 and is classified to section 6311 of this title.
